page.title: Study Abroad Destinations
page.subtitle: Discover world-class universities across 13+ countries. From the historic halls of UK to the innovative campuses of Germany – find your perfect study destination.
page.ctaTitle: Not Sure Which Country Is Right For You?
page.ctaSubtitle: Our expert counselors will help you choose the perfect destination based on your academic goals, budget, and career aspirations.
page.whyStudySubtitle: Discover the advantages that make {{country}} an ideal destination for Bangladeshi students.
page.topUnisSubtitle: We partner with leading universities to help Bangladeshi students achieve their academic goals.
page.readyToStart: Ready to Start Your Journey to {{country}}?
page.readyToStartSubtitle: Book a free consultation with our expert counselors who specialize in {{country}} admissions for Bangladeshi students.

uk.name: United Kingdom
uk.heroDescription: Home to some of the world's oldest and most prestigious universities. A degree from the UK is recognized globally.

usa.name: USA
usa.heroDescription: The dream destination for international students. Limitless opportunities and cutting-edge research.

canada.name: Canada
canada.heroDescription: A welcoming multicultural society with high-quality education and excellent post-graduation work opportunities.

australia.name: Australia
australia.heroDescription: World-class education combined with an unbeatable lifestyle and strong post-study work rights.

germany.name: Germany
germany.heroDescription: Engineering powerhouse offering free or low tuition fees and excellent career prospects.

netherlands.name: Netherlands
netherlands.heroDescription: Known for teaching excellence and a large number of English-taught programs.

sweden.name: Sweden
sweden.heroDescription: A hub for innovation and sustainability with a unique approach to learning.

finland.name: Finland
finland.heroDescription: Famous for its world-leading education system and high quality of life.

denmark.name: Denmark
denmark.heroDescription: Safe, progressive society with a strong focus on research and innovation.

france.name: France
france.heroDescription: Rich cultural heritage combined with affordable, high-quality public education.

italy.name: Italy
italy.heroDescription: Historic universities with a deep appreciation for arts, culture, and science.

latvia.name: Latvia
latvia.heroDescription: An affordable entry point to European education with high-quality technical and business programs.

cyprus.name: Cyprus
cyprus.heroDescription: A beautiful Mediterranean destination offering quality English-taught programs and a great climate.

World-Class Education.title: World-Class Education
World-Class Education.desc: Home to 4 of the top 10 universities in the world.

Short Duration.title: Short Duration
Short Duration.desc: Complete your Master's in just 1 year.

Cultural Hub.title: Cultural Hub
Cultural Hub.desc: Experience a rich history and diverse culture.

Academic Excellence.title: Academic Excellence
Academic Excellence.desc: Home to the majority of the world's top universities.

Flexible Education.title: Flexible Education
Flexible Education.desc: Choose from a vast range of majors and minors.

Career Growth.title: Career Growth
Career Growth.desc: Optional Practical Training (OPT) for up to 3 years.

Innovation Hub.title: Innovation Hub
Innovation Hub.desc: Be at the center of technological advancement.

High Quality of Life.title: High Quality of Life
High Quality of Life.desc: Consistently ranked among the best countries to live.

Post-Grad Work Permit.title: Post-Grad Work Permit
Post-Grad Work Permit.desc: Work up to 3 years after graduation.

Affordable Education.title: Affordable Education
Affordable Education.desc: Lower tuition costs compared to US and UK.

Work while Studying.title: Work while Studying
Work while Studying.desc: Work up to 48 hours per fortnight.

Post-Study Work.title: Post-Study Work
Post-Study Work.desc: Up to 4 years of post-study work rights.

Great Lifestyle.title: Great Lifestyle
Great Lifestyle.desc: Beautiful cities, beaches, and amazing weather.

Low/No Tuition.title: Low/No Tuition
Low/No Tuition.desc: Public universities offer very low or no tuition fees.

Strong Economy.title: Strong Economy
Strong Economy.desc: Largest economy in Europe with massive job opportunities.

Research Focus.title: Research Focus
Research Focus.desc: Leading in engineering, IT, and sciences.

Central Europe.title: Central Europe
Central Europe.desc: Easy to travel and explore the rest of Europe.

Cultural Heritage.title: Cultural Heritage
Cultural Heritage.desc: Rich history, arts, and incredible cuisine.

Research & Innovation.title: Research & Innovation
Research & Innovation.desc: Strong focus on R&D and technological advancement.

Economic Powerhouse.title: Economic Powerhouse
Economic Powerhouse.desc: Major European economy with great job prospects.

Scholarships.title: Scholarships
Scholarships.desc: Many government and univeersity-funded scholarships available.

Language & Culture.title: Language & Culture
Language & Culture.desc: Deep dive into Italian culture, arts, and language.

English Programs.title: English Programs
English Programs.desc: Many programs taught entirely in English.

Interactive Teaching.title: Interactive Teaching
Interactive Teaching.desc: Focus on teamwork and interactive learning.

No Tuition Fees.title: No Tuition Fees
No Tuition Fees.desc: Education is free for EU students; highly subsidized for others.

Nature.title: Nature
Nature.desc: Stunning natural landscapes and clean environment.

Affordable.title: Affordable
Affordable.desc: Lower living costs compared to Western Europe.

History.title: History
History.desc: Rich history and beautiful historical sites.

Safety.title: Safety
Safety.desc: One of the safest countries in the world.

Music & Arts.title: Music & Arts
Music & Arts.desc: A historical center for classical music, arts, and architecture.

Safe & Stable.title: Safe & Stable
Safe & Stable.desc: Highly secure country with a strong social support system.

Quality of Life.title: Quality of Life
Quality of Life.desc: Consistently ranked globally for high living standards.

International Hub.title: International Hub
International Hub.desc: Central location in Europe making travel very easy.

Multilingual.title: Multilingual
Multilingual.desc: Programs taught in English, German, or French.

Central Location.title: Central Location
Central Location.desc: Bordering multiple European countries for easy travel.

Quality Education.title: Quality Education
Quality Education.desc: High standards of teaching closely aligned with industry.

Technology Leader.title: Technology Leader
Technology Leader.desc: At the forefront of technical and IT innovation.

Culture.title: Culture
Culture.desc: Unique blend of history and innovation.
